metadata.description: Static knowledge base for the Spurl assistant. Designed for GitHub Pages and future API migration.
notes: All answers are static and editable in this file.
Shipping, engraving and future service details are placeholders until confirmed.
This structure is suitable for future migration to OpenAI, Claude or Gemini APIs.

quickPrompts: Show me the GAA pitches featured on the site
Tell me about the heritage timeline
Who are the legendary hurling players?

companyInfo.mission: Celebrate Irish hurling through craftsmanship, storytelling and heritage.

engraving.description: Personalised engraving service currently in development.

productCare.oilFrequency: As required when wood appears dry.
productCare.storage: Store in a cool dry location.

manufacturing.description: Spurl is an Irish-created, Irish-owned and Irish-patented product. Manufacturing is currently carried out by specialist production partners overseas, with final preparation and dispatch completed from Ireland.

siteOverview.title: What is Spurl.ie about?
siteOverview.answer: Celebrate Irish hurling through craftsmanship, storytelling and heritage.

siteOverview.title: What can this assistant answer?
siteOverview.answer: This assistant can help with the site’s GAA pitches, heritage timeline, player stories, page navigation and current product information placeholders for shipping, engraving and future services.

siteOverview.title: Which pages are available?
siteOverview.answer: The main site includes index.html for the pitch carousel, heritage.html for the history timeline and players.html for the legendary player profiles. The chatbot page is available for embedding on your live website.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you deliver within Ireland?
shippingFAQ.answer: Yes. Orders are dispatched from Galway, Ireland using An Post. Delivery times and shipping options are shown during checkout.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you deliver to the UK?
shippingFAQ.answer: Yes. We deliver to England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland. Orders are dispatched from Ireland and shipping options are displayed during checkout.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you deliver to Britain?
shippingFAQ.answer: Yes. We currently deliver throughout Great Britain and Northern Ireland.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you deliver to mainland Europe?
shippingFAQ.answer: Yes. We ship to most European destinations. Available countries and delivery options can be viewed during checkout.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you deliver to America?
shippingFAQ.answer: Not yet, but US shipping is planned very soon. We are currently finalising international shipping procedures and customs requirements. Join our mailing list or contact us for updates.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you deliver to Australia?
shippingFAQ.answer: Not yet, but Australian shipping is planned very soon. We are currently preparing the required shipping and customs processes for wooden products.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you deliver to Canada?
shippingFAQ.answer: Canadian shipping is planned for a future release. Please contact us if you would like to be notified when it becomes available.

shippingFAQ.question: Do you ship internationally?
shippingFAQ.answer: We currently ship throughout Ireland, the UK and much of mainland Europe. Additional international destinations are being added as shipping and customs processes are finalised.

shippingFAQ.question: Will I receive tracking information?
shippingFAQ.answer: Where available, tracking information will be provided once your order has been dispatched.

shippingFAQ.question: How quickly are orders dispatched?
shippingFAQ.answer: We aim to dispatch orders as quickly as possible from Galway, Ireland. Current dispatch estimates are shown during checkout.

shippingFAQ.question: Will I have to pay customs charges?
shippingFAQ.answer: International customers may be responsible for local customs duties, import taxes or handling fees depending on their country's regulations.

shippingFAQ.question: Where are orders shipped from?
shippingFAQ.answer: Orders are dispatched from Galway, Ireland.

shippingFAQ.question: How much does shipping cost?
shippingFAQ.answer: Shipping costs vary depending on destination and service level. The exact cost will be calculated and displayed during checkout before payment.

faqs.question: What GAA pitches are featured?
faqs.answer: The site highlights some of Ireland’s most memorable GAA pitches, including Inishturk, Fintra in Donegal, Markievicz Park in Sligo, Achill Sound, Castlewellan, Dingle, Strangford Lough, Croke Park and several other scenic grounds in Mayo, Galway and Kerry.

faqs.question: What is the heritage section about?
faqs.answer: The heritage section traces hurling from ancient Ireland through the modern era, covering mythic traditions, the founding of the GAA in 1884, Croke Park, Bloody Sunday and the survival of the sport across generations.

faqs.question: Who are the legendary hurling players?
faqs.answer: The players section highlights figures such as Mick Mackey, Christy Ring, Nicky Rackard, Jimmy Doyle, Eddie Keher, Pat Hartigan, Brian Whelahan, Henry Shefflin, Joe Canning, Tony Kelly and TJ Reid.

faqs.question: Is Spurl made in Ireland?
faqs.answer: Spurl is Irish-created, Irish-owned and Irish-patented. Manufacturing is currently carried out by specialist production partners overseas, with final preparation and dispatch completed from Ireland.

faqs.question: What products does Spurl offer?
faqs.answer: Spurl is positioned as a handcrafted wooden kitchen products brand. Current information in this knowledge base includes placeholders for product details, custom engraving, shipping costs, dispatch times and future services until confirmed.

heritage.title: The Origins of Hurling
heritage.answer: Hurling is one of the oldest field games in Ireland, with roots stretching back thousands of years. Ancient folklore and archaeological evidence both point to a game deeply woven into Irish myth, culture and identity.

heritage.title: Setanta and Cú Chulainn
heritage.answer: The story of Setanta becoming Cú Chulainn links hurling to Ireland's heroic age. The sport appears in myth as a mark of courage, skill and youthful power.

heritage.title: The Foundation of the GAA
heritage.answer: In 1884, Michael Cusack helped establish the Gaelic Athletic Association to preserve and promote Ireland's native games. The GAA gave hurling a formal structure and helped secure its place in modern Irish life.

heritage.title: Croke Park and the Home of Gaelic Games
heritage.answer: Croke Park became the heart of Gaelic games and an enduring symbol of Irish identity. It is closely linked to historic matches, commemorations and the broader story of the GAA.

heritage.title: Hurling Beyond Ireland
heritage.answer: What began as an ancient Irish pastime is now played across the world. Clubs in London, New York and other international communities keep the game alive and connected to Irish culture.

players.name: Mick Mackey
players.answer: Mick Mackey was the driving force behind Limerick's golden age. His athleticism, leadership and fearless style transformed expectations of what a hurler could achieve.

players.name: Christy Ring
players.answer: Christy Ring is widely regarded as one of the greatest hurlers of all time. He combined skill, power and elegance and inspired generations of players in Cork and beyond.

players.name: Nicky Rackard
players.answer: Nicky Rackard was Wexford's great scoring hero. His leadership and remarkable talent helped lift the county to an All-Ireland title in 1955.

players.name: Henry Shefflin
players.answer: Henry Shefflin, nicknamed 'King Henry', became a defining figure of Kilkenny's golden era. His leadership, composure and scoring made him one of the sport's all-time greats.

players.name: Joe Canning
players.answer: Joe Canning is a modern hurling icon known for his vision, flair and spectacular scoring. He helped inspire Galway's revival and remains one of the game's most recognisable names.

players.name: Tony Kelly
players.answer: Tony Kelly is one of the most naturally gifted players of the modern game. His creativity and elegance have made him the heartbeat of Clare hurling in recent years.

players.name: TJ Reid
players.answer: TJ Reid combines power, precision and consistency. He has carried Kilkenny's traditions into a new era and established himself among the game's greatest forwards.

pitches.name: Inishturk
pitches.answer: Inishturk in Mayo is one of Ireland's most remote pitches, tucked between rugged hills on a tiny Atlantic island. It has become a symbol of how deeply hurling is tied to place and landscape.

pitches.name: Fintra
pitches.answer: Fintra in Donegal is famous for its golden sands and Atlantic setting. The combination of beach, waves and hurling makes it one of the most visually iconic pitches in Ireland.

pitches.name: Markievicz Park
pitches.answer: Markievicz Park in Sligo is known for the dramatic backdrop of Benbulben. The mountain forms a striking cultural and visual setting for Gaelic games.

pitches.name: Achill Sound
pitches.answer: Achill Sound combines sea, sky and sport, with mountain views and Atlantic waters framing the landscape around the pitch.

pitches.name: Croke Park
pitches.answer: Croke Park is the home of Gaelic games in Dublin. It represents the national stage where hurling and football meet community, heritage and sport at scale.

pitches.name: Gallarus
pitches.answer: Gallarus on the Dingle Peninsula combines Atlantic beaches with dramatic Kerry scenery. This area is a reminder that hurling is tied to place as much as to competition.

pitches.name: Inis Oírr
pitches.answer: Inis Oírr on the Aran Islands shows how island life, stone walls and Gaelic games combine in one of Ireland's most celebrated settings.

productInfo.title: What kind of products does Spurl make?
productInfo.answer: Spurl is described as a handcrafted wooden kitchen products brand. The website resources currently highlight the wider heritage and cultural identity of the brand, while product-specific details such as materials, sizes and finishes are to be confirmed.

productInfo.title: Shipping and delivery
productInfo.answer: Shipping costs and delivery terms are not yet confirmed in this knowledge base. Please check the live Spurl site for current shipping details once they are published.

productInfo.answer: Dispatch times are currently placeholders and not yet confirmed. Production and dispatch timing will need to be added when the live store information is available.

productInfo.answer: Engraving details, personalisation options and any associated charges are currently placeholders and are not yet confirmed. These will be added as soon as the live product information is finalised.

productInfo.title: Future services
productInfo.answer: Future services may include custom orders, gift packaging, made-to-order pieces, additional wood finishes and other handcrafted options. These are placeholders for now and should be updated once confirmed.
